items.question: What is a text case converter?
items.answer: A text case converter is a free online tool that changes the capitalization of your text. You can convert between UPPER CASE, lower case, Title Case, Sentence case, Capitalized Case, aLtErNaTiNg CaSe, and iNVERSE CaSe with a single click.

items.question: How do I use this tool?
items.answer: Simply type or paste your text into the text area above, then click on one of the case mode tabs below it. Your text will be converted instantly — no need to press a submit button.

items.question: What is the difference between Title Case and Capitalized Case?
items.answer: Title Case follows AP/Chicago style rules, capitalizing most words but keeping short words like 'a', 'an', 'the', 'of', 'in', 'and', 'or', 'but', 'for', and 'nor' in lowercase (unless they start the sentence). Capitalized Case simply capitalizes the first letter of every word regardless.

items.question: What are Alternating and Inverse case?
items.answer: Alternating case (aLtErNaTiNg) switches each character between lowercase and uppercase, starting with lowercase. Inverse case flips every letter — uppercase becomes lowercase and vice versa, while numbers and symbols stay unchanged.

items.question: Is my text stored or sent to a server?
items.answer: No. All text conversion happens entirely in your browser using JavaScript. Your text is never sent to any server, making this tool completely private and safe to use with sensitive content.

howto.name: How to Convert Text Case
howto.step1: Type or paste your text into the text area
howto.step2: Select a case mode tab (Sentence, lower, UPPER, Capitalized, Alternating, Title, or Inverse)
howto.step3: Your text converts instantly as you select the tab
howto.step4: Click the Copy button to copy the converted text to your clipboard
